name: CrazyGamesAdApi

changelog.breaking: - The expression Get user session data, is changing to get and return a string, or "null" is returned if no data.

shortDescription: CrazyGames SDK: display ads, user accounts, game events for CrazyGames hosting.

eventsFunctions.name: LinkAccountResponse
eventsFunctions.description: Get link account response.

eventsFunctions.name: LastError
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the last error from the CrazyGames API.

eventsFunctions.name: UserSignIn
eventsFunctions.fullName: Check and load if an user is signed in CrazyGames
eventsFunctions.description: Check if an user is signed into CrazyGames. If signed in, retrieves username and profile picture.

eventsFunctions.name: UserSignedIn
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the user is signed in.

eventsFunctions.name: InviteLink
eventsFunctions.description: Return an invite link.

eventsFunctions.name: InviteButton
eventsFunctions.description: Display an invite button.

eventsFunctions.name: LoadSDK
eventsFunctions.description: Load CrazyGames SDK.

eventsFunctions.name: IsSDKLoaded
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the CrazyGames SDK is ready to be used.

eventsFunctions.name: SetGameplayStarted
eventsFunctions.description: Let CrazyGames know gameplay started.

eventsFunctions.name: SetGameplayStopped
eventsFunctions.description: Let CrazyGames know gameplay stopped.

eventsFunctions.name: SetLoadingStarted
eventsFunctions.description: Let CrazyGames know loading started.

eventsFunctions.name: SetLoadingStopped
eventsFunctions.description: Let CrazyGames know loading stopped.

eventsFunctions.name: DisplayCrazyGamesAd
eventsFunctions.description: Display a video ad. The game is automatically muted while the video is playing.

eventsFunctions.name: AdFinishedPlaying
eventsFunctions.description: Checks if a video ad just finished playing successfully.

eventsFunctions.name: IsVideoAdPlaying
eventsFunctions.description: Checks if a video ad is playing.

eventsFunctions.name: UserChanged
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the user changed.

eventsFunctions.name: AdHadAnError
eventsFunctions.description: Check if a video ad had an error.

eventsFunctions.name: GenerateInviteLink
eventsFunctions.description: Generate an invite link to invite friends to join your game sessions. This URL can be added to the clipboard or displayed in the game to let the user select it.

eventsFunctions.name: DisplayHappyTime
eventsFunctions.description: Display an happy time by emitting sparkling confetti. The celebration should remain a special moment.

eventsFunctions.name: ScanForAdBlockers
eventsFunctions.description: Scan for ad blockers.

eventsFunctions.name: IsAdBlocked
eventsFunctions.description: Check if user is using an ad blocker. This condition is always false before the "Scan for ad blockers" is called.

eventsFunctions.name: DisplayBanner
eventsFunctions.description: Display a banner that can be called once per 60 seconds.

eventsFunctions.name: HideBanner
eventsFunctions.description: Hide a banner.

eventsFunctions.name: HideAllBanners
eventsFunctions.description: Hide all banners.

eventsFunctions.name: HideInviteButton
eventsFunctions.description: Hide the invite button.

eventsFunctions.name: Environment
eventsFunctions.description: Get the environment.

eventsFunctions.name: AuthenticateUser
eventsFunctions.description: Retrieve user data.

eventsFunctions.name: ShowAuthWindow
eventsFunctions.description: Show CrazyGames login window.

eventsFunctions.name: LinkAccount
eventsFunctions.description: Show account link prompt.

eventsFunctions.name: UserName
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the username.

eventsFunctions.name: CrazyGamesUserID
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the CrazyGames User ID.

eventsFunctions.name: ProfilePic
eventsFunctions.fullName: Gets the signed-in user's profile picture URL
eventsFunctions.description: Gets the signed-in user's profile picture URL.

eventsFunctions.name: IsInstantMultiplayer
eventsFunctions.description: Return true when the user prefers to instantly join a lobby.

eventsFunctions.name: IsDisableChat
eventsFunctions.description: Return true if the user prefers the chat disabled.

eventsFunctions.name: SystemInfo
eventsFunctions.description: Retrieves user system info, browser, version and device.

eventsFunctions.name: InviteParam
eventsFunctions.description: Get invite parameters if user is invited to this game.

eventsFunctions.name: SaveSessionData
eventsFunctions.description: Save the session data.

eventsFunctions.name: SessionData
eventsFunctions.description: Get user session data, if there is no saved data, "null" will be returned.

eventsFunctions.name: IsUserAccountAvailable
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the availability of the user's account.

eventsFunctions.name: UserToken
eventsFunctions.description: Retrieve the user's session token for authentication.

eventsFunctions.name: XsollaToken
eventsFunctions.description: Retrieve the authentication token from Xsolla.

eventsFunctions.name: GenerateXsollaToken
eventsFunctions.description: Generate Xsolla token.

description: Refer to the [CrazyGames guide](https://docs.crazygames.com/sdk/intro/) for a full overview of the CrazyGames SDK, and to [this guide](https://wiki.gdevelop.io/gdevelop5/extensions/crazy-games-ad-api/details/) for using this SDK inside your GDevelop game.
